scope: Public-safe hygiene summary before the first real Overkill Factory pilot.
safe_cleanup_performed: removed ignored local validation outputs under .tmp
removed Python cache directories under adapters, scripts and tests
attention_items: release candidate material is public-safe but not integrated into the target release ref
do not start the pilot from an ambiguous dirty worktree without an explicit operator decision
must_not_clean_automatically: untracked vFinal schemas, docs, tests, templates and validation receipts are release material, not trash
blocked Hermes/Kanban tasks can be intentional gates and must not be archived as cleanup without owner review
Codex memory, skills, plugin caches and private evidence stores must not be deleted by repo cleanup
next_required_actions: stage, commit and review the public-safe release candidate worktree
rerun release integration preflight on the committed target ref
rerun safety scans after any additional Hermes or Discord cleanup mutation
